releaseNotes:
- Replace Favorites tab with full YouTube browser
- Trending feed (categories: All / Music / Sports / News / ...)
- Search with autocomplete (suggestqueries.google.com, no API quota)
- Watch page: player + title + channel + Up next (no comments/likes)
- Resolves video URLs directly on-device via YouTube's Innertube API
  (no VPS needed — phone's residential IP avoids datacenter bot block)
- Prefer IPv4 for HTTP so AVD/some BD ISPs that lack reliable IPv6 paths
  to googlevideo still play
